description_long: This is a large, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a long-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull and turret are painted in a solid tan color, with visible hatches, periscopes, and storage equipment attached to the exterior. The vehicle features wide, robust tracks for traversing rough terrain, and the sides display a black-and-white cross insignia. The front is characterized by thick, sloped armor and a prominent gun mantlet, while the rear shows exhaust ports and additional stowage. The overall design is utilitarian, with external tools and cables secured along the hull, and the turret includes a visible commander's cupola. The vehicle's imposing size and reinforced construction suggest it is built for frontline combat and urban operations.
description: A large, tan, tracked combat vehicle with a long cannon, heavy armor, and visible military insignia. It features a rotating turret, robust tracks, and external equipment for urban and battlefield use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick sloped armor, central main gun, and wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long cannon, turret details, side insignia, and external equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, exhaust ports, and rear armor details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible tracks, cannon, and side insignia.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front, with a possible coaxial machine gun mount adjacent to the main gun; no other visible mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, sloped panels on the front, sides, and turret; reinforced mantlet and visible heavy construction throughout.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Black-and-white cross insignia on both sides of the hull.
